structure_description: Categorization against a closed label set. Records map each of the 6 specified cause-of-action labels to a list of document titles that match based on evidence text (e.g., '房屋征收' maps to '行政行为-行政征收', '产品责任纠纷' matches verbatim, '罚款' maps to '行政行为-行政处罚').

records.label: 适用特殊程序案件案由
